title: bumelia smallii
intro: Bumelia smallii, also known as the small bumelia, is a shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with bumelia smallii include relief from fever, cough, and colds, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Bumelia smallii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
